タイムサーファー (Time Surfer)

Surf across cosmic platforms while collecting gems and avoiding obstacles! The cosmic end chases you from the left - stay ahead or perish. Dive to gain speed down slopes, release to rise up. Use your limited time rewind ability to undo mistakes and escape danger. Collect gems to increase your score and survive as long as possible!

SPACE: Hold to dive (gain speed), Release to rise | Z: Activate time rewind (costs time energy) | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

test_1_ModeBtn.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 30 seconds, demonstrating basic control competency. The test validates movement physics, collision detection, and basic obstacle avoidance.

TEST_2.test_description: Advanced survival and time rewind test. This validates the complete gameplay loop including the time rewind mechanic to recover from dangerous situations.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively collect gems while using dive mechanics for speed. When approaching dangerous obstacles or the cosmic end gets too close, use time rewind strategically to create distance and avoid death. Optimize gem collection to maximize score.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 60 seconds, collect significant gems, and successfully use time rewind at least once to avoid death. This validates all core mechanics working together for extended gameplay.
